assumptions: The question concerns the IFRS 9 classification of a financial asset, for which the SPPI condition is relevant.

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context links satisfaction of the SPPI condition in paragraph 4.1.2(b) to possible measurement at amortised cost, subject to the separate business model requirement.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context links satisfaction of the SPPI condition in paragraph 4.1.2A(b) to possible measurement at fair value through other comprehensive income, subject to the separate business model requirement.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context indicates that if contractual cash flows are not SPPI, the financial asset cannot be measured at amortised cost or FVOCI and is measured at fair value through profit or loss.
